headline: Wall Street Analysts Believe Trimble (TRMB) Could Rally 33.68%: Here's is How to Trade
summary: The average of price targets set by Wall Street analysts indicates a potential upside of 33.7% in Trimble (TRMB). While the effectiveness of this highly sought-after metric is questionable, the positive trend in earnings estimate revisions might translate into an upside in the stock.
